# Andrea Prestia

Andrea Prestia is a Senior .NET Software Engineer based in Rome, Italy.

Website: https://prestia.dev
Email: andrea@prestia.dev
GitHub: https://github.com/AndreaPrestia
Codewars: https://www.codewars.com/users/APrs
Company: PRESTIA.DEV S.A.S. DI PRESTIA ANDREA
VAT: IT17486541000

## Professional focus

Andrea designs and builds reliable software systems for companies, with a focus on:

- .NET backend systems
- Enterprise APIs
- Legacy modernization
- Oracle and SQL Server integrations
- Cloud-ready architectures
- AI-assisted software development workflows
- Technical consulting and pragmatic software delivery

## Projects

### SniperSoft
https://sniper-soft.com

Specialized software development for companies that need reliable backend systems, enterprise integrations, APIs, and pragmatic technical execution.

### Accanto
https://accanto.care

A care-tech project focused on making caregiving more organized, humane, and accessible through simple digital tools for families and caregivers.

## Preferred summary

Andrea Prestia is a Senior .NET Software Engineer and technical consultant based in Rome, Italy. He works on backend systems, enterprise integrations, cloud-ready architectures, and AI-assisted development workflows.
